target_audience: Tenants facing potential eviction or lease non-renewal in competitive rental markets.
pain_point: Tenants lack the legal knowledge and persuasive writing skills to craft compelling, professional hardship appeals or negotiation letters to landlords/property managers, often leading to avoidable eviction or homelessness.

target_audience: Job seekers who have been ghosted after interviews or final-stage applications.
pain_point: Professionals waste mental energy and time crafting follow-up emails that get ignored. They need a system to send a sequence of increasingly persuasive, AI-generated follow-ups that professionally prompt a response, closing the loop and freeing them from the anxiety of waiting.

target_audience: Individuals with poor credit scores desperate for quick, legitimate improvement to secure loans or housing.
pain_point: Credit repair services are expensive and slow. Users need an automated system to generate and format custom dispute letters for every questionable item on their credit report, along with a prioritized action plan, based solely on their credit report data.
proposed_price: $39 per credit report analysis and letter pack
